report.title: WorkflowAI Pro: The Six-Layer Institutional Architectural Foundation
report.abstract: This report establishes the core architectural blueprint for WorkflowAI Pro, an enterprise-grade AI orchestration and governance platform. It details the integration of the six-layer institutional stack, ranging from adaptive UI experiences and deterministic immune systems (Sentinel v2.4) to high-assurance cloud foundations utilizing AWS Nitro Enclaves and the EAIP Nervous System.
report.content:
# 1. Architectural Topology: The Six-Layer Stack
WorkflowAI Pro is designed to resolve the tension between autonomous agent productivity and institutional risk management. The architecture implements a strict isolation of concerns across six functional layers.
## 1.1 Layer 1: Experience (The Adaptive UI) The Experience Layer utilizes a "Glass Cockpit" design philosophy for orchestrating AI swarms. - **Adaptive Layouts**: UI components are dynamically generated based on the complexity of the AI-decomposed task. - **Cognitive Load Balancing**: Real-time monitoring of user interaction to prevent decision fatigue during high-stakes agentic handoffs. - **Accessibility Integration**: Automated multi-modal enhancement (alt-text generation, speech-to-text feedback) for all generated content.
## 1.2 Layer 2: Immune System (Sentinel v2.4 Governance) The Immune System serves as the deterministic control plane for all probabilistic reasoning kernels. - **GDL Sidecars**: Every reasoning request is intercepted by a Governance Description Language (GDL) compiler. - **Policy-as-Code**: OPA-based Rego policies enforce safety redlines (e.g., "Deny model deployment if training FLOPs > $10^{26}$ without CAIO approval"). - **Kinetic Kill-Switch**: Direct integration with BMC/IPMI for physical power-rail severance in response to SEV-0 alignment failures.
## 1.3 Layer 3: Nervous System (EAIP Interoperability) The Nervous System provides the high-performance, secure communication backbone. - **gRPC/HTTP2**: Binary serialization for sub-millisecond agent-to-agent (A2A) communication. - **SPIFFE/SPIRE Identity**: Cryptographically verifiable machine identity ensuring forensic non-repudiation. - **Recursive Context Envelope (RCE)**: A Merkle-DAG structure that preserves reasoning provenance across complex multi-agent chains.
## 1.4 Layer 4: Brain (Reasoning Kernels) The Brain layer hosts the frontier models (Gemini Pro, GPT-5 classes). - **WorkflowAI Pro Decomposer**: A specialized logic engine that breaks complex user prompts into discrete, executable atomic tasks. - **Alignment Tuning**: PID-based feedback loops that adjust system prompt weights in real-time based on HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) signals.
## 1.5 Layer 5: Memory (Context & RAG) The Memory layer manages the semantic history and grounding data. - **Provenance-Aware Retrieval**: Every fragment retrieved for RAG is tagged with a cryptographic hash. - **Zero-Trust DLP Middleware**: Automated PII scrubbing and demographic proxy neutralization at the point of data retrieval.
## 1.6 Layer 6: Foundation (Infrastructure) The Foundation layer ensures the physical and logical security of the execution environment. - **Nitro Enclaves**: Execution of Reasoning Kernels within isolated Trusted Execution Environments (TEE). - **HardwareEnclaveAttestor (HEA)**: Providing the "Root of Trust" for regulator-defensible execution logs. - **WORM Auditability**: S3 Object Lock for all telemetry logs with SEC-compliant 7-year retention.
